race.comment: WINNING EMOTIONS (13) starting to hit his straps and looks up to this after scoring a convincing win over 1200m at Warren with the 61.5kg. Gets the right run with the claim and can defeat some of his more fancied rivals. HAMMOON SENSATION (4) consistent gelding due for a change of luck. Ploughed through the heavy (9) going to run a respectable second over 1500m here last start. Rinse and repeat today and sure to go close. HOLLYWOOD GOLD (10) holding his form on the country tracks and kept fresh for this. Strong late with a respectable fifth over 1200m at Quirindi. Since kept up to the mark with a 1000m Tamworth trial win. Each way contender. RED RAGS TO BULLS (7) back marker due for a change of luck. Made up good late ground with a tough fourth over 1500m at this track. Place best from the gate.
